title: angadenia coriacea
intro: Angadenia coriacea, also known as the moonflower or evening trumpet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits associated with Angadenia coriacea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its use in treating menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. In herbal preparations, Angadenia coriacea is often combined with other plants to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
